title: pr-shipper stack
description: FIFO array of PR entries the pr-shipper opens, index 0 first. Lead appends only maintainer-approved (shippable) branches.

branch.description: feature branch name (ref shared across worktrees)

title.description: PR title; becomes the squash-merge commit subject. Only real GitHub issue refs, never TaskList IDs.

body_file.description: absolute path to the PR body markdown (lead-vetted refs)

labels.description: comma-separated labels for gh pr create --label

head_sha.description: Pinned commit SHA the maintainer approved for this branch. pr-shipper hard-compares this to the pushed HEAD before gh pr create (enforcement: phase 3).

pushed_to_origin.description: true if branch already on origin (push becomes a no-op)

hold.description: true = pr-shipper SKIPS this entry (not ready to open); absent/false = ready. Lead-only toggle; the shipper re-reads and honors it before the push AND again before gh pr create, and never reorders the stack itself.
